name: rr-input
summary: Form-associated text input with label, helper/error text, and ElementInternals for native form participation.

props.name: type
props.description: Input type attribute (text, email, password, etc.).

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label text above the input.

props.name: helper-text
props.description: Helper text below the input. Hidden when error-text is set.

props.name: error-text
props.description: Error message below the input. Sets aria-invalid and replaces helper text.

props.name: required
props.description: Marks the field as required. Shows asterisk and sets aria-required.

slots.name: label
slots.description: Optional override for the label content.

events.name: input
events.detail: Fired on each keystroke, mirrors native input event.

events.name: change
events.detail: Fired on value commit (blur), mirrors native change event.

cssParts.name: label
cssParts.description: The label element above the input.

rules: Never use hex values — always var(--color-*) or var(--component-*)
Never reference --primitive-* tokens in component code
All text/background pairings must pass WCAG AA (4.5:1)

keyboard: Tab moves focus to the input
Standard text editing keys work natively
rules: aria-errormessage points to error div; aria-describedby mirrors the link while invalid as AT fallback.
When valid, aria-describedby points to helper text. When invalid, it switches to error text.
delegatesFocus ensures host element forwards focus to inner <input>.
ElementInternals.setFormValue() keeps the form value in sync with the input.
